database.sql: SELECT IndexId, ConfigType, ConfigVersion, Address, Port, Id, AlterId, Security, Network, Remarks, HeaderType, RequestHost, Path, StreamSecurity, AllowInsecure, Subid, IsSub, Flow, Sni, Alpn, CoreType, PreSocksPort, Fingerprint, DisplayLog, PublicKey, ShortId, SpiderX, Extra, Ports, Mldsa65Verify, MuxEnabled, Cert FROM ProfileItem WHERE Subid in ('5307176960649387083') AND ConfigType IN ('1', '3', '5', '6');
